summary:
Case-mix based reimbursement fosters process-oriented care by promoting care coordination, efficiency, and integration—key elements linked to systematic, pathway-driven treatment approaches. These outcomes support a shift toward standardizing and structuring care processes within defined diagnostic or epistemic frameworks.  

Final Answer:

\boxed{\text{Yes}}

Revised Summary:

Case-mix based reimbursement encourages process-oriented care through improved coordination and integrated management of treatments across diagnosis-specific episodes. This leads to more predictable, standardized workflows reflecting established clinical protocols for common conditions.
